name: Grotesque Scepter
description: Notes The Grotesque Scepter deals a high amount of lightning damage against a few targets, akin to the Scepter of Devastation before the addition of the Shockblast proc. This scepter’s shockblast is also good, with a large radius and high damage compared to tiered options.

stats.damage: 935 (+4 per WIS over 50) - 135 for each subsequent target

effects: On self: Inflicts Hexed for 1 second; Dazed for 1 second
